name: Vegetable-Sesame Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Crust: Combine all crust ingredients until evenly blended. Pat into a deep pie plate (10-inch). Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes.
2. Filling: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat. Add oil, onion, and garlic; sauté 1 minute. Add chopped vegetables; cook until almost tender (about 10 minutes). Stir in seasonings (last six ingredients). Mix arrowroot or cornstarch with cold water. Stir into 1-1/2 cups more cold water or orange juice. Pour over vegetables. Lower heat and stir until slightly thickened. Pour mixture over crust. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup chopped nuts. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes, or until set.
3. Substitute other vegetables such as mushrooms, cauliflower, purple cabbage, celery, etc.
